title: Senior Software Engineer - Vodafone Idea - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Vodafone Idea - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vodafone Idea family as a Senior Software Engineer in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vodafone Idea:
Vodafone Idea is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
